official_product_url.description: The manufacturer's official product page URL. Null if no official page exists — must include a note in track_c flags explaining why. If the manufacturer sells direct from this URL, it must also appear in track_d purchase_options with a Playwright-verified price.

sources_checked.description: All sources consulted for spec verification, including those that returned no results. Minimum 5 — one per exhaustion step (measured search, community/forum, YouTube/teardown, competitor comparison, manufacturer spec page).

current_price.description: Lowest verified in-stock price across all purchase options

retailer.description: Retailer offering the lowest verified in-stock price

retailer_url.description: Direct URL to the product listing at the lowest verified price

in_stock.description: Whether the product is in stock at the primary (lowest-price) retailer

in_budget_only_at_sale_price.description: True when the product's regular/list price exceeds the user's budget and it only qualifies because of a current sale or promotion. Triggers a prominent warning in the guide.

purchase_options.description: All verified purchase options for this product, sorted by price ascending. Each option was confirmed live via Playwright at time of research.

url.description: Direct product listing URL, verified live

verified_live.description: Whether this URL and price were confirmed by Playwright at time of research

store_location.description: For in-store-only retailers: the specific store name and city confirmed to carry this product. Null for online-only.

page_title.description: Browser tab title at time of Playwright fetch — evidence of which page was loaded.

ownership_change.description: Null if no recent acquisition or ownership change. Otherwise: '[Manufacturer] acquired by [Acquirer] on [date]. [Brief note on operational continuity and warranty implications].' Check within the past 3 years.

price_verified_live.description: Whether the primary URL price was confirmed by Playwright immediately before generation

price_at_generation.description: The price confirmed live at generation time. Null if page could not be fetched.
